title: AI-generated music has the industry at a loss
subhead: Tracks churned out by AI tools like Suno and Udio are flooding the market, and they're becoming nearly harder to spot. Now streaming platforms face a choice: do they tell their listeners, or not?

title: 'The use of lethal autonomous weapons controlled by AI goes against the principles of a just war'
subhead: In both Iran and Gaza, the rise in targeted strikes carried out by artificial intelligence systems already has serious consequences for the fundamental principle of civilian protection, philosopher Marie-des-Neiges Ruffo de Calabre tells Le Monde in an interview.

subhead: Like 42 other rescue workers since the war began on March 2, 16-year-old Joude Souleiman was killed by an Israeli drone strike in Nabatieh, the second-largest Shiite city in southern Lebanon, where only a few hundred people out of 75,000 residents remain.

title: From afar, American students in France feel the shockwaves of Trump
subhead: As academic freedom declines in the US, some young people are choosing France to pursue master's and doctoral degrees. Yet, between delayed scholarships, intrusive questions and stereotypes, their experience remains shaken by the latest developments in their country.

title: The serial-poisoning mother and daughter inspired by 'Breaking Bad'
subhead: Castor beans, wolfsbane, antifreeze, rat poison: Carole D. and Amélie D. considered every possible method to poison the former's partner, Enrique B. The two women are set to stand trial before a criminal court in western France starting March 25.
